title: What humility actually looks like on a strong man
caption:
Humility is misread. Most men think it means shrinking — getting small, asking for less, pretending you don't have anything worth offering.

That's not it.

Real humility is what a man looks like when he's genuinely secure. He can hear a hard word without flinching because he's not built on the opinion of the room. He defers to wisdom above his own because he's honest about what he doesn't know. He gets on his knees because he's not confused about who's actually in charge.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6.

That's not a threat. It's a description of who God actually works through.

—

Save this for the man who's been confusing confidence with arrogance.

#faith #godlymen #humility #christianmen #manofgod #scripture #discipline
